data.title: Etsy expects positive growth in Q3, analysts update price targets post mixed Q2 results. Key numbers: PT raised to $64 to $72.
data.description: Etsy Inc (NASDAQ: ETSY) experienced a drop in shares during early trading due to their second-quarter results showing a mix of performance. Key analysts responded differently to the report. Cantor Fitzgerald's Deepak Mathivanan maintained a Neutral rating but adjusted the price target from $52 to $64. On the other hand, Needham's Bernie McTernan stuck with a Buy rating and raised the price target from $55 to $72. Cantor Fitzgerald noted that Etsy surpassed Street expectations in quarterly gross merchandise sales (GMS) and EBITDA by 2% and 4%, respectively. The company also saw a moderation in declines at its core business. To read more about analyst stock ratings and detailed insights, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: ADLM 2025 drew 16,500 attendees discussing plastics impact on health, medical misinformation, and AI in clinics.
data.description: On July 31, 2025 in Chicago, the Association for Diagnostics & Laboratory Medicine (ADLM, previously known as AACC) hosted ADLM 2025, attracting thousands of lab professionals. The event, held from July 27-31, highlighted the latest developments and innovations in the field.

data.title: HTX announces strong growth with increased user base and trading volume for first half of 2025. #Empowerment2025.
data.description: In Panama City on July 31, 2025, HTX disclosed its mid-year results and strategic plan for 2025. The prominent crypto exchange reported strong performance in the first half of the year, showing a significant increase in both user numbers and trading volume. This growth indicates a resilient trend in the company's operations, signaling positive advancement in the market.

data.title: Centric PLM featured in Gartner's 2025 Market Guide, offering comprehensive tools for product development efficiency in the food & beverage industries.
data.description: In an announcement made on July 31, 2025, Centric Software® introduced Centric PLM™ for food & beverage in CAMPBELL, Calif. This innovative system streamlines formulation, specifications, ingredient listings, nutrition details, and regulatory compliance to enhance product development efficiency. This development emphasizes the company's commitment to revolutionizing the industry.

data.title: GarageExperts® opens first franchise in Montana, providing garage flooring and cabinets; Bozeman location launched on July 31, 2025.
data.description: A seasoned professional in the construction industry introduces a top garage renovation brand to Bozeman, Montana. On July 31, 2025, GarageExperts® revealed the launch of its inaugural facility in the area. Specializing in garage flooring, bespoke cabinets, and organizational systems, GarageExperts® is a prominent player in the sector.

data.title: StaffDNA, based in Plano, Texas, has obtained six new patents, bringing its total to 19. Recognized for technology in healthcare hiring and management.
data.description: StaffDNA, based in Plano, Texas, disclosed on July 31, 2025, a surge in its patent collection, reaching a total of 19 patents for its innovative technology tailored for the healthcare recruitment and workforce management sector. The U.S. Patent and Trademark Office (USPTO) has been instrumental in this portfolio expansion.

data.title: Richmond American Homes to build Piedmont Estates in Culpeper County with 93 future homesites.
data.description: Piedmont Estates, located in Jeffersonton, Virginia, is set to showcase a variety of ranch and two-story floor plans. Richmond American Homes of Virginia, Inc., which is a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., has successfully acquired and finalized the purchase of 93 upcoming homesites in the area.

data.title: Ellipsis Health chosen for CMS Health Tech Ecosystem to revolutionize national healthcare AI; Sage AI care manager pivotal.
data.description: In efforts to modernize national healthcare, Artificial Intelligence (AI) Care Management has been identified as a crucial component. San Francisco-based Ellipsis Health, known for Sage, the emotionally intelligent AI care manager, has been chosen as a strategic partner in the Health Tech Ecosystem initiative. This recognition highlights the importance of AI in transforming healthcare services. The partnership with Ellipsis Health signifies a significant step towards incorporating advanced technology in the healthcare sector. This development showcases the increasing reliance on AI, with Ellipsis Health playing a pivotal role in this initiative.

data.title: Robinhood's crypto trading volumes surged in July, but Bernstein suggests it's early in the bull cycle. Revenues up 46%, EBITDA margin 56%, total crypto trading volume fell 39%. Robinhood saw volumes spike to six-month highs in July.
data.description: Bernstein, an investment firm, stated in a recent report that the ongoing rally in digital assets is still in its early stages, maintaining a positive outlook on the overall crypto market despite a decline in second-quarter trading volumes. The firm emphasized that the crypto bull cycle is still in its early phases, as outlined in a note following Robinhood's Q2 earnings release. Despite relatively stable prices in Q2, Robinhood demonstrated strong performance, with revenues increasing by 46% year-over-year and an adjusted EBITDA margin rising to 56% from 51% in the previous quarter. Although total crypto trading volume dropped by 39% sequentially due to decreased market volatility, Bernstein highlighted a rebound in activity in July. In particular, Robinhood observed a surge in crypto volumes to six-month highs last month, indicating favorable momentum going into the second half of 2025. The analysts from Bernstein underscored the platform's capability to enhance crypto-related revenues and product offerings, suggesting positive growth prospects for the market ahead.

data.title: Inventor from Wisconsin creates DIGITAL STUDENT ID FOR BUSES to streamline bus route efficiency and reduce paperwork.
data.description: A resident of Pleasant Prairie, Wisconsin, and bus driver has introduced a new system named the DIGITAL STUDENT ID FOR BUSES in Pittsburgh on July 31, 2025. The system aims to ensure that every student boards the appropriate bus efficiently. By streamlining processes, the inventor intends to minimize paperwork and save time for transportation staff.

data.title: CNCF announces schedule for 10th anniversary KubeCon + CloudNativeCon North America in Atlanta from Nov. 10-13. Celebrating what's next for cloud native infrastructure.
data.description: The highly anticipated KubeCon + CloudNativeCon North America conference is set to take place from November 10th to 13th in Atlanta. This event will mark a significant milestone as the global community gathers to commemorate the 10th anniversary of the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF). Participants will delve into discussions about the future of cloud native infrastructure. The conference is organized by CNCF and will be held in Atlanta.

data.title: Materna Medical finishes enrolling 420 first-time mothers in EASE trial (NCT03973281) evaluating Ellora™ Obstetrical System's effectiveness.
data.description: Materna Medical, a women’s health company based in Mountain View, California, has recently completed enrollment in its EASE pivotal trial (NCT03973281). The trial involved 420 first-time mothers who participated in evaluating the safety and effectiveness of the Ellora™ Obstetrical System, an investigational solution aimed at reducing pelvic muscle injury during vaginal delivery. This study, known as the EASE trial, is prospective in nature and focuses on the potential benefits for first-time mothers. The completion of enrollment marks a significant milestone for Materna Medical and its ongoing efforts to address pelvic floor disorders.

data.title: Plan a summer getaway to Miami Beach for spa indulgences, culinary delights, and hotel deals. Perfect destination to relax.
data.description: In Miami Beach, Florida, as of July 31, 2025, summer is still in full swing and remains the ideal time for a luxurious yet affordable vacation. This sought-after destination offers a variety of seasonal experiences, including diverse cuisine and significantly reduced prices on accommodations. With a wide range of options, visitors can enjoy the sun-soaked delights of Miami Beach without breaking the bank.
